name: Galmaarden (Belgium)
description: Gyronny of ten white and black, the black gyrons charged with gold cross-crosslets, with a blue shield bearing a gold lion at the centre.
history: The flag of Galmaarden derives from the municipal coat of arms. A former municipality in the province of Flemish Brabant, merged into Pajottegem in 2025.

features.role: gyronny of ten pieces, white and black
gold cross-crosslets on the black gyrons
a blue shield with a gold lion
